creator: timur@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Hi! 

Can you, please, provide more information about which version of Samba 
port do you use? Also, I'd recommend you first of all to upgrade to the 
latest and greatest(tm) version of the port and check, if the problem 
persists. 

There were some fixes in the winbindd land in the last (3.0.32) release. 

With regards, Timur.
